news.t: Tech stocks are making a comeback, but it doesn't look sustainable. Here's how to play the sector.

holdings.infoBox: FNGS is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 18.41%, Broadcom at 10.47%, Alphabet at 10.12%, Apple at 10.09%, and NVIDIA at 9.85%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors FANG+ ETN (FNGS) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the NYSE FANG+ index. The fund tracks an equally-weighted index of US-listed technology and consumer discretionary companies, selected by a committee. FNGS was launched on Nov 15, 2019 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.title: Tech stocks are making a comeback, but it doesn't look sustainable. Here's how to play the sector.
data.text: Experts recommend sticking to large-cap stocks, having conviction and looking for short-term yield opportunities.

data.title: 9 Tech ETFs to Buy Now
data.text: The best technology ETFs provide exposure to wide swaths of innovators, or targeted groups of tech stocks harnessing rising trends.
